name: youtube-channel-admin
description: Manage your YouTube channel: upload videos, thumbnails, metadata, comments, captions and analytics — with a performance dashboard and home widgets

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c magenta,cyan "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.build:web: MCP_APP_ENTRY=dashboard MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=true vite build && MCP_APP_ENTRY=widget-top-videos MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=false vite build && MCP_APP_ENTRY=widget-performance MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=false vite build && MCP_APP_ENTRY=widget-alerts MCP_APP_EMPTY_OUTDIR=false vite build
scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun run build:server
